seo.title: Choosing the Right Illumination Type — Wholesale Guide for Sign Shops | Sunlite Signs
seo.metaDescription: Compare face-lit, halo-lit, front-and-halo, and non-illuminated channel letters at wholesale trade pricing. Learn when to specify each illumination type for your sign shop clients.
keywords: face lit vs halo lit trade
front and halo lit signs trade

de.title: Choosing the Right Illumination Type — Großhandel Guide for Sign Shops | Sunlite Signs
de.metaDescription: Compare front-beleuchtet, halo-beleuchtet, front-and-halo, and nicht-beleuchtet Leuchtbuchstaben at Großhandel Händlerpreise. Learn when to specify each illumination type for your Schilderwerkstatt clients.

data.subtitle: A wholesale guide for sign shop professionals and trade buyers. The illumination style of a channel letter sign defines how it looks at night and shapes the impression it makes on customers. This guide compares the four primary options to help you recommend the right choice for every project — all available at trade pricing.

de.subtitle: A Großhandel guide for Schilderwerkstatt professionals and Fachhändler. The illumination style of a Leuchtbuchstabe sign defines how it looks at night and shapes the impression it makes on customers. This guide compares the four primary options to help you recommend the right choice for every project — all available at Händlerpreise.

data.heading: Get Your Product
data.description: Ready to put our complimentary engineering services to work on your next project? Send us your details and receive a detailed wholesale quote within 48 hours.

de.heading: Starten Sie Ihr
de.description: Bereit, unsere kostenlosen Konstruktionsleistungen für Ihr nächstes Projekt einzusetzen? Senden Sie uns Ihre Details und erhalten Sie ein detailliertes Großhandelsangebot innerhalb von 48 Stunden.
